  1. org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.adapter
Adapters that bridge MCP annotation-based providers to the MCP SDK transport layer.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.prompt
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP prompt list changed notifications.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.resource
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP resource list changed notifications.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.tool
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP tool list changed notifications.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.complete
Method callbacks for MCP completion (chat) requests, sync and async.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.elicitation
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP elicitation (user input) requests.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.logging
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP logging.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.progress
Method callbacks and specifications for MCP progress reporting.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling
Method callbacks for MCP sampling (create message) requests.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.provider.resource
MCP providers that expose resource read handlers to the transport layer.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.provider.tool
MCP providers that expose tool (call_tool) handlers to the transport layer.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.adapter
    Class
    Description
    McpComplete
    Annotates a method used for completion functionality in the MCP framework.
    McpPrompt
    Marks a method as a MCP Prompt.
    McpResource
    Marks a method as a MCP Resource.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.prompt
    Class
    Description
    McpPromptListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle prompt list change notifications from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.resource
    Class
    Description
    McpResourceListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle resource list change notifications from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.changed.tool
    Class
    Description
    McpToolListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle tool list change notifications from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.complete
    Class
    Description
    McpComplete
    Annotates a method used for completion functionality in the MCP framework.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.elicitation
    Class
    Description
    McpElicitation
    Annotation for methods that handle elicitation requests from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.logging
    Class
    Description
    McpLogging
    Annotation for methods that handle logging message notifications from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.progress
    Class
    Description
    McpProgress
    Annotation for methods that handle progress notifications from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling
    Class
    Description
    McpSampling
    Annotation for methods that handle sampling requests from MCP servers.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.provider.resource
    Class
    Description
    McpResource
    Marks a method as a MCP Resource.
